form.formComment: Finished third last start (25.67) at big odds over 431m at this track. Boxed the fence this time. One of the better hopes.

form.formComment: Was out of the placings last time but the start prior finished in the minors when second (20.39) over 340m at this track. Draws an inside box and is among the better hopes.

formComments.comment: Was out of the placings last time but the start prior finished in the minors when second (20.39) over 340m at this track. Draws an inside box and is among the better hopes.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked off heels rounding the first turn.
Raced tightly along the back straight.

form.formComment: Could only manage eighth last time but placed two on end prior to that, the latest when third (20.18) over 340m at this track. Has a low draw but appears tested on latest effort.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Could only manage eighth last time but placed two on end prior to that, the latest when third (20.18) over 340m at this track. Has a low draw but appears tested on latest effort.

form.formComment: Modest effort last time out when fourth over 340m at this track. Happy to risk this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Modest effort last time out when fourth over 340m at this track. Happy to risk this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked off heels entering the first turn.

form.formComment: Struggling to break through but racing consistently, finishing in the minors three starts on end. Last time out flew the lids with a fast early sectional but gathered in and finished in the minors when second (19.98) at this track over 340m. Overdue for a win and gets her chance this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Struggling to break through but racing consistently, finishing in the minors three starts on end. Last time out flew the lids with a fast early sectional but gathered in and finished in the minors when second (19.98) at this track over 340m. Overdue for a win and gets her chance this time.

form.formComment: Finished off last campaign with a second (18.62) in a GR 4/5 at Dubbo and returns after a three months break. Has started fresh up two times for a win and a placing. Looks a place chance at best.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Finished off last campaign with a second (18.62) in a GR 4/5 at Dubbo and returns after a three months break. Has started fresh up two times for a win and a placing. Looks a place chance at best.

form.formComment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at this track over 340m in 19.84. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when fifth over 340m at this track at Grade 5 level. Not suited by wide draw, hard to have this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at this track over 340m in 19.84. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when fifth over 340m at this track at Grade 5 level. Not suited by wide draw, hard to have this time.

form.formComment: Could only manage eighth last time but the start prior hit the frame when second (19.88) over 340m at this track. Has to overcome a wide draw but is in the mix.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Could only manage eighth last time but the start prior hit the frame when second (19.88) over 340m at this track. Has to overcome a wide draw but is in the mix.

form.formComment: Was out of the placings at final run of last campaign, finishing eighth (27.11) at this track before going for a three-and-a-half months spell. Yet to win but has placed from two first-up runs. Makes plenty of appeal fresh.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was out of the placings at final run of last campaign, finishing eighth (27.11) at this track before going for a three-and-a-half months spell. Yet to win but has placed from two first-up runs. Makes plenty of appeal fresh.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Tightened for room and lost momentum entering the first turn.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 6th over 340m at this track beaten 10 lengths (20.80) behind Sketchy Stories in a Grade 5 on April 1. Looks well placed and should prove hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Latest effort finished 6th over 340m at this track beaten 10 lengths (20.80) behind Sketchy Stories in a Grade 5 on April 1. Looks well placed and should prove hard to beat.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Came together at the turn out of the back straight and was forced wide.
Tightened for room and lost significant ground entering the first turn.
